text:
Market today: The mood in tech/chips is mixed. While TSMC had a record quarter, expectations are "exceptionally high." Meanwhile, SK Hynix volatility points to "AI euphoria swings to fatigue," suggesting potential choppiness for your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL is down -34.95% and SPAL -37.57%. Both are leveraged ETFs, and trading on margin amplifies these significant drawdowns. These need your immediate attention.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions' stops and the overall sentiment in the chip sector for signs of further "AI fatigue."

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged chip positions amidst a potentially cooling sector sentiment.
plays: SOXL: Your -34.95% loss on this 3x leveraged ETF is significant. Review your stop at 200; consider if your risk tolerance allows holding this position given its decay and volatility.
SPAL: This new leveraged ETF is already down -37.57%. Re-evaluate your stop at 21.38 and position size, as margin amplifies these fast moves.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The chip sector has mixed signals (TSMC expectations vs. SK Hynix fatigue).
